{{Quote|Captain Nalgol is correct: you are supreme commander of the Braxant Sector Fleet only with regard to operations within Braxant sector. Missions to Morishim and Bothawui do not fall under this authority.|[[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Dorja]] to [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Vilim Disra|Disra]]|<ref name="Specter of the Past">''[[Specter of the Past]]''</ref>}}
The '''Braxant Sector Fleet''' was a segment of the [[Imperial Remnant]] [[Imperial Navy/Legends|fleet]] [[Sector fleet/Legends|responsible]] for protecting the [[Braxant sector/Legends|Braxant sector]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. By [[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]], it contained thirteen [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyers]], including the ''[[Obliterator]]'', [[Ironhand (Imperial-class)|''Ironhand'']], [[Relentless (Dorja)|''Relentless'']], and ''[[Tyrannic]]''. It also guarded [[Rimcee Station]].
